Shift + Right-Click on the block to change interface modes

Shift + Right-Click on the block to change interface modes
block.sgjourney.ancient_gene_detector.de: Device that activates in the presence of Ancient Technology Activation gene
block.sgjourney.ancient_gene_detector.ri: Right-Click to detect ATA gene in yourself
block.sgjourney.ancient_gene_detector.re: Power with redstone to detect ATA gene in nearby entities (radius increased by 2 blocks for every redstone signal level)
block.sgjourney.transceiver.description: Device used for transmitting and receiving signals from other Transceivers and GDOs

filled_map.sgjourney.astria_porta: Map to the Ring of Gods
advancements.sgjourney.adventure.root.de: Start your journey into the Stargate universe by finding a Golden Idol
advancements.sgjourney.adventure.use_sta: Step through the Stargate for the first time
advancements.sgjourney.adventure.interga: Travel through the Stargate to another Galaxy
advancements.sgjourney.adventure.visit_l: Visit Lantea and notice how the Atlantis is WIP
advancements.sgjourney.adventure.visit_d: Visit Destiny and notice how it's WIP
advancements.sgjourney.technology.obtain: Hold Transport Rings and notice how they differ from the Stargate
Jury rig a device capable of interfacing with the Stargate
Smelt Raw Naquadah to create a Naquadah Ingot
Don't use a mixer for this
Combine Raw Naquadah with another material to create a Naquadah Mixture
Smelt a Naquadah Mixture to create a Naquadah Alloy
Smelt Raw Naquadah Block to create Refined Naquadah
Obtain an Iris to shield your Stargate from incoming traffic
Craft a piece of the Classic Stargate
tooltip.sgjourney.control_crystal.descri: Can change the functionality of technology based on uploaded programs
Activates Advanced Protocols when placed inside a DHD
tooltip.sgjourney.memory_crystal.descrip: Can store memory entries of Addresses, Transporter IDs, coordinates, etc.
tooltip.sgjourney.memory_crystal.crystal: Memory Entries can be edited with a Crystal Computer
tooltip.sgjourney.energy_crystal.descrip: Can store Energy and increase the Energy Target
tooltip.sgjourney.transfer_crystal.descr: Can increase Energy Transfer rate and Transfer Efficiency
Can be tuned to a specific frequency or increase communication range
Frequency can be changed with a Crystal Computer
tooltip.sgjourney.call_forwarding_device: When placed inside a DHD, redirects any incoming travelers to another Stargate if they can't pass through its filter
tooltip.sgjourney.ring_remote.descriptio: Handheld device that can hold a Memory Crystal and control Transport Rings
tooltip.sgjourney.ring_remote.usage.sele: Shift + Right-Click cycles through memory entries
tooltip.sgjourney.ring_panel.description: Device used for controlling Transport Rings
tooltip.sgjourney.ring_panel.button.no_t: No Transporter in Network %s in range
No Transporter in another Dimension in range
tooltip.sgjourney.ring_panel.energy_targ: If the amount of energy in the Transporter is below the amount specified by the Energy Target, the Ring Panel will attempt to transfer energy to the Transporter until the Energy Target is met
Place Energy Crystals in the crystal slots of the Ring Panel to increase the Energy Target
tooltip.sgjourney.ring_panel.energy_tran: The amount of energy the Ring Panel can transfer to the Transporter per tick
Place Transfer Crystals in the crystal slots of the Ring Panel to increase the energy transfer speed
tooltip.sgjourney.ring_panel.communicati: The maximum range from which the Ring Panel will be able to connect to a Transporter
tooltip.sgjourney.ring_panel.networks.de: If network restrictions are active, Transporter connections are limited to Transporters in the same networks
tooltip.sgjourney.ring_panel.networks.us: Communication Crystal (with Frequency) -> Add Transporter to another Network
tooltip.sgjourney.transporter.connection: Maximum range at which the Transporter can connect to another Transporter
tooltip.sgjourney.transporter.energy_rea: Current range of the Transporter, given the amount of energy stored
tooltip.sgjourney.transporter.interdimen: If enabled, the Transporter will be able to transport across dimensions in the same Solar System
tooltip.sgjourney.transport_rings.connec: Maximum range at which the Transport Rings can connect to another Transporter
tooltip.sgjourney.transport_rings.energy: Current range of the Transport Rings, given the amount of energy stored
tooltip.sgjourney.transport_rings.interd: If enabled, the Transport Rings will be able to transport across dimensions in the same Solar System
Place a Materialization Crystal in the center crystal slot of the Transport Rings to allow interdimensional transport
tooltip.sgjourney.transport_rings.total_: Transport Rings can draw store and draw extra energy from Energy Crystals, allowing them to reach further than their own energy storage would allow
Place Energy Crystals in crystal slots of the Transport Rings to increase total energy they can store
tooltip.sgjourney.transport_rings.transf: Higher Transfer Efficiency reduces energy spent per block of distance during transport
Place Transfer Crystals next to other Transfer Crystals and Energy Crystals to increase Transfer Efficiency
tooltip.sgjourney.transport_rings.networ: If network restrictions are active, Transport Rings connections are limited to Transporters in the same networks
Communication Crystal (with Frequency) -> Add Transporter to another Network
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.description: Dial Home Device used to control Stargates
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.dialing_menu: Right-Click on the top to open dialing menu
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.crystal_menu: Right-Click on the sides or Shift + Right-Click on the top to open crystal menu
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.advanced_protocols: Advanced Protocols will close the Stargate connection if there is no potential traveler nearby for 10 seconds and allow for automatic symbol remapping
Place a Large Control Crystal in the middle crystal slot of the DHD to activate Advanced Protocols
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.energy_target.desc: If the amount of energy in the Stargate is below the amount specified by the Energy Target, the DHD will attempt to transfer energy to the Stargate until the Energy Target is met
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.energy_target.usag: Place Energy Crystals in the crystal slots of the DHD to increase the Energy Target
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.energy_transfer.de: The amount of energy the DHD can transfer to the Stargate per tick
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.energy_transfer.us: Place Transfer Crystals in the crystal slots of the DHD to increase the energy transfer speed
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.communication_rang: The maximum range from which the DHD will be able to connect to a Stargate
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.networks.descripti: If network restrictions are active, Stargate connections are limited to Stargates in the same networks
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.communication_rang: No Frequency -> Increase DHD communication range
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.networks.usage.com: Frequency -> Add Stargate to another Network
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.energy_slot.descri: Holds Energy Cores, ZPM and other energy providing items
tooltip.sgjourney.dhd.energy_fuel_slot.d: Holds items for refueling Energy Cores
tooltip.sgjourney.interface.energy_targe: If the amount of energy in the Stargate is below the amount specified by the Energy Target, the Interface will attempt to transfer energy to the Stargate until the Energy Target is met
tooltip.sgjourney.interface.mode.ring_se: Provides Comparator output based on which third of the Stargate's symbol ring the currently selected symbol is located
tooltip.sgjourney.interface.mode.ring_ro: Provides Comparator output based on the currently selected symbol's position within the 3rd of the symbol ring
tooltip.sgjourney.interface.mode.chevron: Provides Comparator output based on the current number of engaged chevrons
tooltip.sgjourney.interface.mode.wormhol: Provides Comparator output based on the current state of the wormhole
tooltip.sgjourney.interface.mode.iris.us: Provides Comparator output based on how much the Iris is closed
Opens/closes the Iris based on the redstone signal strength provided to the Interface
- Redstone signal input strength 1-7 -> Closes Iris
- Redstone signal input strength 8-15 -> Opens Iris
tooltip.sgjourney.stargate_upgrade.descr: Right-click on a Classic Stargate to upgrade it
tooltip.sgjourney.stargate_variant.descr: Right-click on a Stargate to change its variant
tooltip.sgjourney.cable.zpm_transfer: Can handle transferring Energy from a ZPM
tooltip.sgjourney.pocket_crystal_compute: Device that can be used to edit information stored on crystals
Place a crystal inside the computer or hold one in the other hand
tooltip.sgjourney.naquadah_power_cell.de: Device that converts Liquid Naquadah and Heavy Liquid Naquadah to Energy
tooltip.sgjourney.naquadah_power_cell.re: Right-Click in Off-Hand to Reload with Naquadah Vial in Main Hand
tooltip.sgjourney.matok.open_close: Shift + Right-Click in Main Hand to Open/Close
tooltip.sgjourney.matok.reload: Shift + Right-Click in Off-Hand to Reload with Naquadah Vial in Main Hand
tooltip.sgjourney.kara_kesh.terror_knock: Shift + Right-Click in Main Hand to change modes
tooltip.sgjourney.kara_kesh.use: Right-Click on an Entity to use
tooltip.sgjourney.pda.info: Right-click: Get information about the target
tooltip.sgjourney.zpm.description: Device that extracts vacuum energy from an artificial region of subspace-time until it reaches maximum entropy
tooltip.sgjourney.gdo.description.gui: Shift + Right-Click to open GDO interface
tooltip.sgjourney.naquadah_fuel_rod.desc: A rod with fuel used to power Naquadah Generators
